title: Not Enough Items
description: Recipe Viewer, Inventory Manager, Item Spawner, Cheats and more!
body:
Recipe Viewer, Inventory Manager, Item Spawner, Cheats and more!

NEI has been retired in Minecraft 1.12+. Please use [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei).

We are partnered with [CreeperHost](https://www.creeperhost.net/partner/chickenbonesgzj)! Use promo code `chickenbonesgzj` at checkout for 10% off your first month
